ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the head coach of the team */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team captain */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's uniform */,
  "team_secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team's uniform */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Center) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "player_contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's current contract started */,
  "player_contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player's current contract ends */,
  "player_contract_value" INTEGER /* Value of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "coach_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "coach_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "coach_contract_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach's current contract started */,
  "coach_contract_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the coach's current contract ends */,
  "coach_contract_value" INTEGER /* Value of the coach's current contract */,
  "coach_previous_teams" TEXT /* Previous teams the coach has coached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the champion team */,
  "champion_coach_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the champion team's coach */,
  "champion_player_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the MVP of the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the team in the playoffs */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the playoffs (e.g., First Round, Finals) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the round */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the round */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the round */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the season */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the opposing team in the playoff */,
  "playoff_date" TEXT /* Date of the playoff game */,
  "playoff_location" TEXT /* Location of the playoff game */,
  "playoff_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the playoff game */,
  "playoff_result" TEXT /* Result of the playoff game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* String of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
